prerequisites.label: Python 3.9+
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Python 3.9 or newer. Mac: brew install python@3.12. VPS: ships in the container image.

prerequisites.label: OpenRouter API Key (for AI-assisted editing)
prerequisites.satisfy: Optional. Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY=<your key> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env for AI-assisted editing features. Get your key from openrouter.ai > Keys.
